## RemarksAnnotationNode interface

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.

Remarks annotation — programmatic-persona documentation carried via the `x-<vendor>-remarks` JSON Schema extension keyword.

Populated from `@remarks` TSDoc tag content. SDK codegen can include this in doc comments; API Documenter renders the source `@remarks` natively in a dedicated Remarks section.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface RemarksAnnotationNode
```
